review_notes: This entry records a redacted Auth/RBAC smoke summary for the existing bf20432 Foundation Alpha POC runtime.

The verifier source was updated at 3a3da257484d4d430a7a26e00a6f1cdae39a2b12 to avoid treating governance policy class labels as credential leaks while still failing closed on actual credential-like values.
No real credential header value, DSN, object locator, hidden executor data, runtime workspace path, or personal Windows path is included.

This evidence supports the Foundation Alpha POC security baseline only. It does not close production auth rollout, capacity, sandbox hardening, ordinary-user multi-agent, department rollout, runtime export, or release-evidence retention gates.
open_followups: Broader auth/session/RBAC/tenant/redaction regression remains required before production gate closure.
#21 recorded multi-tenant capacity/load evidence remains required before raising production concurrency defaults.
G7 Docker sandbox hardening and Docker-capable sandbox smoke remain blocked.
G8 ordinary-user multi-agent exposure remains feature-flagged/internal only.
G9 release-evidence runtime export and retention runtime acceptance remain open.
Packaged frontend image smoke/release acceptance remains separate from this thin-shell POC smoke.
